extendedTextMessage.text:
"Welcome to the Bot Deployment Group! This is a community for developers, engineers, and enthusiasts focused on sharing knowledge, best practices, and tools for deploying and managing bots across various platforms. Whether you're working on chatbots, automation bots, or AI-driven solutions, join us to collaborate, troubleshoot, and stay updated on the latest trends in bot deployment!"
BEHAVE TO AVOID BEING REMOVED👿😈
🫴

videoMessage.caption: 𝐘𝐨𝐮 𝐚𝐫𝐞 𝐟𝐫𝐞𝐞 𝐘𝐨𝐮 𝐜𝐚𝐧 𝐂𝐚𝐥𝐥 𝐦𝐞 𝐉𝐀𝐊𝐀𝐃𝐎𝐍𝐆𝐎 𝐧𝐨𝐰😂😂,,𝐇𝐢𝐢 𝐜𝐡𝐚𝐥𝐥𝐞𝐧𝐠𝐞 𝐡𝐚𝐢𝐧𝐠𝐞𝐧𝐢𝐩𝐢𝐭𝐚 𝐡𝐢𝐯𝐨😂😂
